Title: User Registration and Account Creation
Preconditions: None

2. Tap on the 'Register' button

4. Tap on the 'Create Account' button
5. Wait for the system to process the request
6. Verify that the user is redirected to the main application screen
Expected Result: The user should successfully create an account and be able to navigate within the application.
